title: SpecFile
description: Root of an <area>.spec.json file. Validates as a SpecFile.

DisplayMode.title: DisplayMode
DisplayMode.description: How a spec renders in the browser. Phase 1 ships tooltip + sidebar; the others are reserved for forward compatibility.

LocalizedString.title: LocalizedString
LocalizedString.description: Locale-keyed text: a BCP-47 locale maps to a non-empty string. At least one entry. Flat strings are not accepted.

SpecSource.title: SpecSource
SpecSource.description: Provenance of a spec. "manual" is human-authored; "ai-generated" output must be reviewed.

ElementFingerprint.title: ElementFingerprint
ElementFingerprint.description: Multi-signal capture of a DOM element, separated from business content so relinking never touches the spec text.

testId.description: data-testid / data-cy / data-qa / data-spec-id. Tier 1 anchor.

domPath.description: Tag chain from an ancestor down to the element, e.g. ["form","button"].

attributes.description: Whitelisted attributes: role, type, name, placeholder, href pattern.

Spec.title: Spec
Spec.description: A business specification pinned to one UI element.

id.description: Stable unique id within the project, e.g. "login-submit-btn".

SpecFile.title: SpecFile
SpecFile.description: A Specpin <area>.spec.json file: a named group of specs pinned to UI elements.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for editor tooling.

locales.description: BCP-47 locales this project authors specs in. The extension's language picker offers the union of connected projects' locales.

ViewsConfig.title: ViewsConfig
ViewsConfig.description: The .specs/views.json team-default visibility config. `hidden` is a flat list of facet keys (tag: / file: / spec: / url:) the team hides by default; the extension parses the prefix.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for editor tooling.

GuideDef.title: GuideDef
GuideDef.description: One named onboarding guide: an ordered list of spec ids to walk through. Empty steps means the guide falls back to all matched specs in default order at launch.

id.description: Stable unique id within the file, e.g. "onboarding".

name.description: Plain-string UI label (not a LocalizedString; step content is localized via the referenced specs).

description.description: Optional plain-string blurb shown when the guide launches.

steps.description: Ordered spec ids. May be empty, in which case the guide walks all matched specs in default order.

GuidesConfig.title: GuidesConfig
GuidesConfig.description: The .specs/guides.json named-guides config: a versioned file holding an array of named onboarding guides.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for editor tooling.
Optional pointer to this schema for editor tooling.

domains.description: Origins where this project's UI runs, e.g. ["app.acme.io","localhost:3000"].

specFiles.description: Relative names of the <area>.spec.json files in this .specs/ dir.
